specializations: Drug and active ingredient nanocrystal engineering
certifications: Helsinki Stock Exchange listed (Nasdaq First North)
product_highlights: CESS® (Controlled Expansion of Supercritical Solutions) — proprietary nanonization technology
Particle size reduction to 10–200 nm range for dramatically enhanced bioavailability
Nanocrystal formulation services for cosmetic and pharmaceutical actives
Amorphous nanoparticle development for poorly soluble active ingredients
notes: Nanoform is a Finnish nanotechnology company specializing in CESS® (Controlled Expansion of Supercritical Solutions) technology, which produces highly uniform nanoparticles from active ingredients to dramatically improve bioavailability and skin penetration. Originally developed for pharmaceutical applications, CESS® technology is increasingly being adopted for high-performance cosmetic actives where maximum bioavailability is required. Nanoform's ability to nano-engineer virtually any active makes them a forward-looking supplier for the SKIN-TWIN engine's advanced formulation optimization.
